- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- dataviz: Use this skill whenever you are about to create ANY chart, graph, plot, dashboard, or data visualization, in ANY output medium — an HTML or React artifact, inline SVG, plotting code in any library (matplotlib, plotly, d3, Recharts, …), an image/PNG you will render and upload, or a chart shared into Slack. Read it BEFORE writing the first line of chart code, choosing chart colors, building a stat tile / meter / KPI row, or laying out a dashboard. Produces visualizations that read as one system — elegant, accessible, consistent in light and dark — using a brand-neutral placeholder palette you swap for your own. Teaches a design-system-agnostic method: a form heuristic, a color formula with a runnable validator, mark specs, and interaction rules. A validated default palette is documented in `references/palette.md` — swap that file's values for your brand's. Triggers on: "chart", "graph", "plot", "data viz", "visualization", "dashboard", "analytics", "visualize data", "categorical colors", "sequential / diverging palette", "stat tile", "sparkline", "heatmap", "legend", "axis", "tooltip", "chart colors", "color by series".
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).

# General Information

## Maintainer
Waldemar Koprek [waldemar.koprek@psi.ch]

## Author
Oliver Bründler [oli.bruendler@gmx.ch]

## License
This library is published under [PSI HDL Library License](License.txt), which is [LGPL](LGPL2_1.txt) plus some additional exceptions to clarify the LGPL terms in the context of firmware development.

## Changelog
See [Changelog](Changelog.md)

## Detailed Documentation
The main documentation is in the [psi\_multi\_stream\_daq](https://github.com/paulscherrerinstitute/psi_multi_stream_daq) repo. The logic is implemented in this general VHDL repository because the IP-Core is used not only.

[Documentation](https://github.com/paulscherrerinstitute/psi_multi_stream_daq/blob/master/doc/psi_multi_stream_daq.pdf)

[Reference Design User Guide](./doc/ReferenceDesignUserGuide.pdf)

## Tagging Policy
Stable releases are tagged in the form *major*.*minor*.*bugfix*. 

* Whenever a change is not fully backward compatible, the *major* version number is incremented
* Whenever new features are added, the *minor* version number is incremented
* If only bugs are fixed (i.e. no functional changes are applied), the *bugfix* version is incremented

<!-- DO NOT CHANGE FORMAT: this section is parsed to resolve dependencies -->

## Dependencies

* TCL
  * [PsiSim](https://github.com/paulscherrerinstitute/PsiSim) (2.1.0 or higher, for development only)
  * [PsiIpPackage](https://github.com/paulscherrerinstitute/PsiIpPackage) (2.0.0, for development only)
* VHDL
  * [psi\_common](https://github.com/paulscherrerinstitute/psi_common) (2.5.0 or higher)
  * [psi\_tb](https://github.com/paulscherrerinstitute/psi_tb) (2.2.2 or higher, for development only)
  * [psi\_multi\_stream\_daq](https://github.com/paulscherrerinstitute/psi_multi_stream_daq) (1.2.0 or higher)
* VivadoIp
  * [vivadoIP\_axis\_data\_gen](https://github.com/paulscherrerinstitute/vivadoIP_axis_data_gen) (1.2.0, for reference design only)
  * [**vivadoIP\_psi\_ms\_daq**](https://github.com/paulscherrerinstitute/vivadoIP_psi_ms_daq)
  
<!-- END OF PARSED SECTION -->
  
Dependencies can also be checked out using the python script *scripts/dependencies.py*. For details, refer to the help of the script:

```
python dependencies.py -help
```

Note that the [dependencies package](https://github.com/paulscherrerinstitute/PsiFpgaLibDependencies) must be installed in order to run the script.

# Description
This IP-core implements generic multi-stream data acquisition engine that writes data directly into a memory connected via AXI (e.g. a DDR memory).

Main features are:
* Up to 16 Streams with different widths
* Record data for up to 32 triggers before the software has to read data
* Linear- and Ring-Buffer mode
* High-bandwidth (64-bit internal datapath -> 2 GB/sec @ 250 MHz)
* A reference design is provided

## Important Note
This repository only contains a wrapper to the VHDL implementation of the functionality in [psi\_multi\_stream\_daq](https://github.com/paulscherrerinstitute/psi_multi_stream_daq). So any change of functionality must be implemented there.

To get this 23 * information, refer to the IP-Core documentation 24 * 25 * @section thread_safety Thread Safety 26 * 27 * The driver is not thread-safe in general. If API functions are used in more 28 * than one thread (e.g. in main and IRQs), these API functions must be protected (e.g. by disabling IRQs 29 * while the function is executing). 30 * 31 * In the simplest case, the IP core is configured before IRQs are enabled and afterwards data is only read 32 * from IRQs. In this case, no protection is required. 33 * 34 * Why is the IRQ disabling not implemented in the driver itself? Well, what IRQs must be disabled depends 35 * on what IRQs the driver API is used from. There may also other protection schemes be used (e.g. mutexes of a RTOS). 36 * As a result there is not single true protection mechanism that can be implemented within the driver. 37 * 38 * @section irq_handling IRQ Handling 39 * 40 * The driver supports two ways of handling IRQs. One of them (Window based IRQ) is a bit more elaborate and easy to use 41 * but it only covers the case, that each recorded window is processed by software. This is true 42 * in general but the IP-core also allows special configurations where data can be overwritten 43 * even if it was not processed. Since the handling of IRQs becomes more specific in this case, 44 * a special IRQ handling scheme called Stream based IRQ is implemented. In this case the 45 * user is responsible for implementing all actions to be taken in IRQs. 46 * 47 * In all IRQ handling schemes, the user is responsible for calling the function PsiMsDaq_HandleIrq() whenever the IP core 48 * asserts its interrupt (level sensitive, high active). 49 * 50 * Only one IRQ handlig scheme can be used per stream (not both at the same time for the same stream). 51 * 52 * @subsection window_irq Window based IRQ 53 * 54 * In this handling scheme, the driver ensures that the user callback gets called exactly once for every window that is recorded. 55 * Spurious interrupts (IRQs getting detected after the data was already processed) are suppressed by the driver. All information 56 * about the window which was completed is automatically passed to the user callback. 57 * 58 * This handling scheme only works if each window is really processed by the user and protected against being overwritten until 59 * the user acknowledged the processing. Implementationwise this means that window overwriting must be disable (config.overwrite = false) 60 * and that the user must acknowledge the processing of each window before new data can be recorded into it (by calling PsiMsDaq_StrWin_MarkAsFree()). 61 * 62 * Benefits of this scheme is simplicity, drawback is that the driver assumes that the user processes each window which may not 63 * be the case in special cases. 64 * 65 * @subsection stream_irq Stream based IRQ 66 * 67 * In this handling scheme, the driver does only detect which stream fired an IRQ and calls the user callback function. 68 * The callback function is called regardless of how many new windows were recorded. The user can do whatever processing 69 * of the IRQ he wants. This allows fine grained control over the IP core in special cases but it also means that the user 70 * is fully on his own. Therefore this option should only be used if there are good reasons for not using Window based IRQ. 71 * 72 * @section example_code Example Code 73 * 74 * This section contains a little code example to show how the driver is used. 75 * 76 * @code{.c} 77 * // *** Static Variables *** 78 * static PsiMsDaq_IpHandle daqHandle; 79 * static PsiMsDaq_StrHandle daqStrHandle; 80 * 81 * // *** System ISR *** 82 * //ISR that is called by the OS/baremetal drivers if an IRQ is asserted 83 * void PsiMsDaqIrqHandler(void* arg) 84 * { 85 * //We assume the handle to the psi_ms_daq driver is passed as callback argument 86 * PsiMsDaq_IpHandle ipHandle = (PsiMsDaq_IpHandle) arg; 87 * //Call IP-handling function 88 * PsiMsDaq_HandleIrq(ipHandle); 89 * } 90 * 91 * // *** IP User ISR *** 92 * void UserDaqIsr(PsiMsDaq_WinInfo_t winInfo, void* arg) 93 * { 94 * //Invalidate cache, example code is for xilinx devices 95 * Xil_DCacheInvalidateRange(, ); 96 * //Get recorded data 97 * PsiMsDaq_StrWin_GetDataUnwrapped(winInfo, , , , sizeof()); 98 * //Acknowledge processing of the data 99 * PsiMsDaq_StrWin_MarkAsFree(winInfo); 100 * } 101 * 102 * // *** Main function containing intialization *** 103 * int main() 104 * { 105 * //Initialize IP 106 * daqHandle = PsiMsDaq_Init(, , , NULL); 107 * PsiMsDaq_GetStrHandle(daqHandle, 0, &daqStrHandle); 108 * 109 * //Configure Stream 110 * PsiMsDaq_StrConfig_t cfg = { 111 * .postTrigSamples = , 112 * .recMode = , 113 * .winAsRingbuf = true, 114 * .winOverwrite = false, 115 * .winCnt = , 116 * .bufStartAddr = , 117 * .winSize = , //in bytes 118 * .streamWidthBits = 119 * }; 120 * PsiMsDaq_Str_Configure(daqStrHandle, &cfg); 121 * //Register ballback 122 * PsiMsDaq_Str_SetIrqCallbackWin(daqStrHandle, UserDaqIsr, NULL); 123 * //Enable IRQ 124 * PsiMsDaq_Str_SetIrqEnable(daqStrHandle, true); 125 * //Enable recorder for stream 126 * PsiMsDaq_Str_SetEnable(daqStrHandle, true); 127 * 128 * //Wait in endless loop for IRQs comming in 129 * while(1){}; 130 * } 131 * @endcode 132 */ 133 134 //******************************************************************************* 135 // Includes 136 To get this * information, refer to the IP-Core documentation * * @section thread_safety Thread Safety * * The driver is not thread-safe in general. If API functions are used in more * than one thread (e.g. in main and IRQs), these API functions must be protected (e.g. by disabling IRQs * while the function is executing). * * In the simplest case, the IP core is configured before IRQs are enabled and afterwards data is only read * from IRQs. In this case, no protection is required. * * Why is the IRQ disabling not implemented in the driver itself? Well, what IRQs must be disabled depends * on what IRQs the driver API is used from. There may also other protection schemes be used (e.g. mutexes of a RTOS). * As a result there is not single true protection mechanism that can be implemented within the driver. * * @section irq_handling IRQ Handling * * The driver supports two ways of handling IRQs. One of them (Window based IRQ) is a bit more elaborate and easy to use * but it only covers the case, that each recorded window is processed by software. This is true * in general but the IP-core also allows special configurations where data can be overwritten * even if it was not processed. Since the handling of IRQs becomes more specific in this case, * a special IRQ handling scheme called Stream based IRQ is implemented. In this case the * user is responsible for implementing all actions to be taken in IRQs. * * In all IRQ handling schemes, the user is responsible for calling the function PsiMsDaq_HandleIrq() whenever the IP core * asserts its interrupt (level sensitive, high active). * * Only one IRQ handlig scheme can be used per stream (not both at the same time for the same stream). * * @subsection window_irq Window based IRQ * * In this handling scheme, the driver ensures that the user callback gets called exactly once for every window that is recorded. * Spurious interrupts (IRQs getting detected after the data was already processed) are suppressed by the driver. All information * about the window which was completed is automatically passed to the user callback. * * This handling scheme only works if each window is really processed by the user and protected against being overwritten until * the user acknowledged the processing. Implementationwise this means that window overwriting must be disable (config.overwrite = false) * and that the user must acknowledge the processing of each window before new data can be recorded into it (by calling PsiMsDaq_StrWin_MarkAsFree()). * * Benefits of this scheme is simplicity, drawback is that the driver assumes that the user processes each window which may not * be the case in special cases. * * @subsection stream_irq Stream based IRQ * * In this handling scheme, the driver does only detect which stream fired an IRQ and calls the user callback function. * The callback function is called regardless of how many new windows were recorded. The user can do whatever processing * of the IRQ he wants. This allows fine grained control over the IP core in special cases but it also means that the user * is fully on his own. Therefore this option should only be used if there are good reasons for not using Window based IRQ. * * @section example_code Example Code * * This section contains a little code example to show how the driver is used. * * @code{.c} * // *** Static Variables *** * static PsiMsDaq_IpHandle daqHandle; * static PsiMsDaq_StrHandle daqStrHandle; * * // *** System ISR *** * //ISR that is called by the OS/baremetal drivers if an IRQ is asserted * void PsiMsDaqIrqHandler(void* arg) * { * //We assume the handle to the psi_ms_daq driver is passed as callback argument * PsiMsDaq_IpHandle ipHandle = (PsiMsDaq_IpHandle) arg; * //Call IP-handling function * PsiMsDaq_HandleIrq(ipHandle); * } * * // *** IP User ISR *** * void UserDaqIsr(PsiMsDaq_WinInfo_t winInfo, void* arg) * { * //Invalidate cache, example code is for xilinx devices * Xil_DCacheInvalidateRange(, ); * //Get recorded data * PsiMsDaq_StrWin_GetDataUnwrapped(winInfo, , , , sizeof()); * //Acknowledge processing of the data * PsiMsDaq_StrWin_MarkAsFree(winInfo); * } * * // *** Main function containing intialization *** * int main() * { * //Initialize IP * daqHandle = PsiMsDaq_Init(, , , NULL); * PsiMsDaq_GetStrHandle(daqHandle, 0, &daqStrHandle); * * //Configure Stream * PsiMsDaq_StrConfig_t cfg = { * .postTrigSamples = , * .recMode = , * .winAsRingbuf = true, * .winOverwrite = false, * .winCnt = , * .bufStartAddr = , * .winSize = , //in bytes * .streamWidthBits = * }; * PsiMsDaq_Str_Configure(daqStrHandle, &cfg); * //Register ballback * PsiMsDaq_Str_SetIrqCallbackWin(daqStrHandle, UserDaqIsr, NULL); * //Enable IRQ * PsiMsDaq_Str_SetIrqEnable(daqStrHandle, true); * //Enable recorder for stream * PsiMsDaq_Str_SetEnable(daqStrHandle, true); * * //Wait in endless loop for IRQs comming in * while(1){}; * } * @endcode */ //******************************************************************************* // Includes //******************************************************************************* #include #include #include //******************************************************************************* // Constants //******************************************************************************* /// @cond //ACQCONF Registers - General #define PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_GCFG 0x000 #define PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_GCFG_BIT_ENA (1 << 0) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_GCFG_BIT_IRQENA (1 << 8) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_GSTAT 0x004 #define PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_IRQVEC 0x010 #define PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_IRQENA 0x014 #define PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_STRENA 0x020 //ACQCONF Registers - Per Stream #define PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_MAXLVL(n) (0x200+0x10*(n)) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_POSTTRIG(n) (0x204+0x10*(n)) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_MODE(n) (0x208+0x10*(n)) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_MODE_LSB_RECM 0 #define PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_MODE_MSB_RECM 1 #define PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_MODE_BIT_ARM (1 << 8) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_MODE_BIT_REC (1 << 16) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_LASTWIN(n) (0x20C+0x10*(n)) //CTXMEM for Stream n #define PSI_MS_DAQ_CTX_SCFG(n) (0x1000+0x20*(n)) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_CTX_SCFG_BIT_RINGBUF (1 << 0) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_CTX_SCFG_BIT_OVERWRITE (1 << 8) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_CTX_SCFG_LSB_WINCNT 16 #define PSI_MS_DAQ_CTX_SCFG_MSB_WINCNT 20 #define PSI_MS_DAQ_CTX_SCFG_LSB_WINCUR 24 #define PSI_MS_DAQ_CTX_SCFG_MSB_WINCUR 28 #define PSI_MS_DAQ_CTX_BUFSTART(n) (0x1004+0x20*(n)) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_CTX_WINSIZE(n) (0x1008+0x20*(n)) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_CTX_PTR(n) (0x100C+0x20*(n)) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_CTX_WINEND(n) (0x1010+0x20*(n)) //WNDW Window w for Stream n #define PSI_MS_DAQ_WIN_WINCNT(n, w, so) (0x4000+(so)*(n)+0x10*(w)) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_WIN_WINCNT_LSB_CNT 0 #define PSI_MS_DAQ_WIN_WINCNT_MSB_CNT 30 #define PSI_MS_DAQ_WIN_WINCNT_BIT_ISTRIG (1 << 31) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_WIN_LAST(n, w, so) (0x4004+(so)*(n)+0x10*(w)) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_WIN_TSLO(n, w, so) (0x4008+(so)*(n)+0x10*(w)) #define PSI_MS_DAQ_WIN_TSHI(n, w, so) (0x400C+(so)*(n)+0x10*(w)) /// @endcond //******************************************************************************* // Types //******************************************************************************* //*** Handles *** typedef void* PsiMsDaq_IpHandle; ///< Handle to an instance of the driver for a complete IP typedef void* PsiMsDaq_StrHandle; ///< Handle to a specific stream of the driver //*** Functions for access to data of the IP core *** /** * @brief Copy used to copy data recorded to other memory locations in PsiMsDaq_StrWin_GetDataUnwrapped() * * @param src Source memory address (exactly the way the IP sees the address space) * @param dst Desitnation memory address (as the CPU sees it) * @param n Number of bytes to copy */ typedef void PsiMsDaq_DataCopy_f(void* dst, void* src, size_t n); /** * @brief Write an IP-register * * @param addr Address to write (byte address) * @param value Value to write */ typedef void PsiMsDaq_RegWrite_f(const uint32_t addr, const uint32_t value); /** * @brief Read an IP-register * * @param addr Address to read from (byte address) * @return Read value */ typedef uint32_t PsiMsDaq_RegRead_f(const uint32_t addr); /** * @brief Window definition struct, used for more compact passing of common parameters * @note This is not a handle and this struct is allocated on the stack, so it is only valid * until the function returns! */ typedef struct { uint8_t winNr; ///< Window number PsiMsDaq_IpHandle ipHandle; ///< Handle of the IP the window belongs to PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHandle; ///< Handle of the stream the window belongs to }PsiMsDaq_WinInfo_t; /** * @brief Interrupt callback function for the window based IRQ scheme. * In this IRQ scheme, one callback function is called for each window that arrives. * This IRQ scheme is only usable if window-overwrite is disable (config.onverwrite = false). * After the window data is processed, it must be freed by calling PsiMsDaq_StrWin_MarkAsFree(). * * @param winInfo Window information struct (allocated on stack!) * @param arg User argument list */ typedef void PsiMsDaqn_WinIrq_f(PsiMsDaq_WinInfo_t winInfo, void* arg); /** * @brief Interrupt callback function for the stream based IRQ scheme. * In this IRQ scheme, one callback function is called whenever the IP fires an IRQ. * This IRQ scheme is always usable but usually only required if window-overwrite is used (since the * more elaborate window based IRQ scheme is not usable in this case). * * @param strHandle Handle of the stream that fired the IRQ * @param arg User argument list */ typedef void PsiMsDaqn_StrIrq_f(PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHandle, void* arg); /** * @brief Recorder mode (see documentation) */ typedef enum { PsiMsDaqn_RecMode_Continuous = 0, ///< Continuous recording PsiMsDaqn_RecMode_TriggerMask = 1, ///< Continuously record pre-trigger data but only detect triggers after PsiMsDaq_Str_Arm() was called PsiMsDaqn_RecMode_SingleShot = 2, ///< Only record pre-trigger after PsiMsDaq_Str_Arm() was called and stop recording after one trigger PsiMsDaqn_RecMode_Manual = 3 ///< Manaully control the recording by setting and clearing the arm bit } PsiMsDaq_RecMode_t; /** * @brief Stream configuration struct */ typedef struct { uint32_t postTrigSamples; ///< Number of post trigger samples (incl. Trigger sample) PsiMsDaq_RecMode_t recMode; ///< Recording mode bool winAsRingbuf; ///< Use individual windows as ring-buffers (true=ringbuffer mode, false=linear mode) bool winOverwrite; ///< If true, windows are overwritten even if they contain data. Usually set false here. uint8_t winCnt; ///< Number of windows to use uint32_t bufStartAddr; ///< Start address of the buffer for this stream uint32_t winSize; ///< Size of the windows uint16_t streamWidthBits; ///< Width od the stream in bits (must be a multiple of 8) } PsiMsDaq_StrConfig_t; /** * @brief Memory access functions struct */ typedef struct { PsiMsDaq_DataCopy_f* dataCopy; ///< Data copy function to use PsiMsDaq_RegWrite_f* regWrite; ///< Register write function to use PsiMsDaq_RegRead_f* regRead; ///< Register read function to use } PsiMsDaq_AccessFct_t; /** * @brief Return codes */ typedef enum { PsiMsDaq_RetCode_Success = 0, ///< No error, everything OK PsiMsDaq_RetCode_IllegalStrNr = -1, ///< Illegal stream number passed PsiMsDaq_RetCode_IllegalStrWidth = -2, ///< Illegal steram width selected PsiMsDaq_RetCode_StrNotDisabled = -3, ///< This function is only allowed if the stream is disbled but it was enabled PsiMsDaq_RetCode_IllegalWinCnt = -4, ///< Illegal window count passed PsiMsDaq_RetCode_IllegalWinNr = -5, ///< Illegal window number passed PsiMsDaq_RetCode_NoTrigInWin = -6, ///< This window does not contain a trigger as required for this function call PsiMsDaq_RetCode_BufferTooSmall = -7, ///< The buffer passed is too small to contain all data PsiMsDaq_RetCode_MorePostTrigThanConfigured = -8, ///< More post trigger data requested than configured to be recorded PsiMsDaq_RetCode_MorePreTrigThanAvailable = -9, ///< More pre-trigger data requested than available PsiMsDaq_RetCode_WinSizeMustBeMultipleOfSamples = -10, ///< Window size must be a multiple of the sample size PsiMsDaq_RetCode_IrqSchemesWinAndStrAreExclusive = -11 ///< Only one IRQ scheme (...Str or ...Win) can be used } PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t; //******************************************************************************* // IP Wide Functions //******************************************************************************* /** * @brief Initialize the psi_ms_daq IP-Core * * @param baseAddr Base address of the IP core to access * @param maxStreams Maximum number of streams supported by this IP (must match setting in Vivado IPI) * @param maxWindows Maximum number of windows per stream supported by this IP (must match setting in Vivado IPI) * @param accessFct_p Memory access functions to use (pass NULL to use the default functions) * @return Driver Handle */ PsiMsDaq_IpHandle PsiMsDaq_Init( const uint32_t baseAddr, const uint8_t maxStreams, const uint8_t maxWindows, const PsiMsDaq_AccessFct_t* const accessFct_p); /** * @brief Get a handle to a specific stream number * * @param ipHandle Driver handle for the whole IP * @param streamNr Stream number to get handle for * @param strHndl_p Pointer to write the stream handle to * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_GetStrHandle( PsiMsDaq_IpHandle ipHandle, const uint8_t streamNr, PsiMsDaq_StrHandle* const strHndl_p); void PsiMsDaq_HandleIrq(PsiMsDaq_IpHandle inst_p); //******************************************************************************* // Stream Related Functions //******************************************************************************* /** * @brief Configure stream. * * @param strHndl Driver handle for the stream * @param config_p Struct containing all settings * @return Return Code * * @note This function is only allwed if the corresponding stream is disabled */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_Str_Configure( PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHndl, PsiMsDaq_StrConfig_t* const config_p); /** * @brief Enable/Disable a stream * * @param strHndl Driver handle for the stream * @param enable true for enable, false for disable * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_Str_SetEnable( PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHndl, const bool enable); /** * @brief Set window based interrupt callback function for a stream to be called whenever a new * windows is recorded. * * @param strHndl Driver handle for the stream * @param irqCb Callback function. Pass NULL to unregister the callback. * @param arg_p Arguments passed to the user callback function * @return Return Code * * @note Only one IRQ scheme (...Win or ...Str) can be used. Usually ...Win is * used if window overwriting is disabled (config.overwrite = false) and ...Str * otherwise. */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_Str_SetIrqCallbackWin( PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHndl, PsiMsDaqn_WinIrq_f* irqCb, void* arg_p); /** * @brief Set stream based interrupt callback function for a stream to be called whenever a new * windows is recorded. Usually PsiMsDaq_Str_SetIrqCallbackWin() is used instead of this * function. So without special reasons, use PsiMsDaq_Str_SetIrqCallbackWin(). * * @param strHndl Driver handle for the stream * @param irqCb Callback function. Pass NULL to unregister the callback. * @param arg_p Arguments passed to the user callback function * @return Return Code * * @note Only one IRQ scheme (...Win or ...Str) can be used. Usually ...Win is * used if window overwriting is disabled (config.overwrite = false) and ...Str * otherwise. */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_Str_SetIrqCallbackStr( PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHndl, PsiMsDaqn_StrIrq_f* irqCb, void* arg_p); /** * @brief Enable/Disable IRQ for a stream * * @param strHndl Driver handle for the stream * @param irqEna true for enable, false for disable * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_Str_SetIrqEnable( PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHndl, const bool irqEna); /** * @brief Arm the recorder for a given stream * * @param strHndl Driver handle for the stream * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_Str_Arm(PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHndl); /** * @brief Get maximum input buffer fill level * * @param strHndl Driver handle for the stream * @param maxLvl_p Pointer to write the level into * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_Str_GetMaxLvl( PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHndl, uint32_t* const maxLvl_p); /** * @brief Clear the maximum input buffer fill level * * @param strHndl Driver handle for the stream * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_Str_ClrMaxLvl( PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHndl); /** * @brief Get the number of free windows. * * This function is implemented by looping over all windows and checking if they * contain any unacknowledged data. This is quite slow but the only safe approach. * So do not use this function excessively. * * @param strHndl Driver handle for the stream * @param freeWindows_p Pointer to write the number of free windows into * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_Str_GetFreeWindows( PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHndl, uint8_t* const freeWindows_p); /** * @brief Get the number of used (non-free) windows. * * This function is implemented by looping over all windows and checking if they * contain any unacknowledged data. This is quite slow but the only safe approach. * So do not use this function excessively. * * @param strHndl Driver handle for the stream * @param usedWindows_p Pointer to write the number of used windows into * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_Str_GetUsedWindows( PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHndl, uint8_t* const usedWindows_p); /** * @brief Get the number of windows configured to be used for a given stream * * @param strHndl Driver handle for the stream * @param windows_p Pointer to write the number of windows into * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_Str_GetTotalWindows( PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHndl, uint8_t* const windows_p); /** * @brief Get the IP Handle of the IP a stream belongs to * * @param strHndl Driver handle for the stream * @param ipHandle_p Pointer to write the IP handle into * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_Str_GetIpHandle( PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHndl, PsiMsDaq_IpHandle* ipHandle_p); /** * @brief Get the stream number from a stream handle * * @param strHndl Driver handle for the stream * @param strNr_p Pointer to write the stream number into * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_Str_GetStrNr( PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHndl, uint8_t* strNr_p); //******************************************************************************* // Window Related Functions //******************************************************************************* /** * @brief Get number of valid and unacknowledged bytes in a window * * @param winInfo Window information * @param noOfBytes_p Pointer to write number of bytes into * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_StrWin_GetNoOfBytes( PsiMsDaq_WinInfo_t winInfo, uint32_t* const noOfBytes_p); /** * @brief Get number of valid and unacknowledged samples in a window * * @param winInfo Window information * @param noOfSamples_p Pointer to write number of samples into * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_StrWin_GetNoOfSamples( PsiMsDaq_WinInfo_t winInfo, uint32_t* const noOfSamples_p); /** * @brief Get the number of pre-trigger samples in a window (post trigger samples are known by config) * * @param winInfo Window information * @param preTrigSamples_p Pointer to write number of pre-trigger samples into * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_StrWin_GetPreTrigSamples( PsiMsDaq_WinInfo_t winInfo, uint32_t* const preTrigSamples_p); /** * @brief Get the timestamp of a window * * @param winInfo Window information * @param timestamp_p Pointer to write the timestamp to * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_StrWin_GetTimestamp( PsiMsDaq_WinInfo_t winInfo, uint64_t* const timestamp_p); //******************************************************************************* // Advanced Functions (only required for close control) //******************************************************************************* /** * @brief Check if the recorder of a given stream is currently recording data * * @param strHndl Driver handle for the stream * @param isRecording_p Pointer to write the result into * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_Str_IsRecording( PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHndl, bool* const isRecording_p); /** * @brief Get the currently used recorder window * * @param strHndl Driver handle for the stream * @param currentWin_p Pointer to write the result into * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_Str_CurrentWin( PsiMsDaq_StrHandle strHndl, uint8_t* const currentWin_p); /** * @brief Read a register * * @param ipHandle Driver handle for the whole IP * @param addr Register address * @param value_p Read value * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_RegRead( PsiMsDaq_IpHandle ipHandle, const uint32_t addr, uint32_t* const value_p); /** * @brief Set a field in a register (RMW) * * @param ipHandle Driver handle for the whole IP * @param addr Register address * @param lsb Least significant bit number of the field * @param msb Most significant bit number of the field * @param value Value to write * @return Return Code * * @note This function should only be used for debugging purposes! * Otherwise the driver might not work. */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_RegSetField( PsiMsDaq_IpHandle ipHandle, const uint32_t addr, const uint8_t lsb, const uint8_t msb, const uint32_t value); /** * @brief Read a field from a register * * @param ipHandle Driver handle for the whole IP * @param addr Register address * @param lsb Least significant bit number of the field * @param msb Most significant bit number of the field * @param value_p Read value * @return Return Code */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_RegGetField( PsiMsDaq_IpHandle ipHandle, const uint32_t addr, const uint8_t lsb, const uint8_t msb, uint32_t* const value_p); /** * @brief Set a bit in a register (RMW) * * @param ipHandle Driver handle for the whole IP * @param addr Register address * @param mask Bitmask * @param value Value to write * @return Return Code * * @note This function should only be used for debugging purposes! * Otherwise the driver might not work. */ PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t PsiMsDaq_RegSetBit( PsiMsDaq_IpHandle ipHandle, const uint32_t addr, const uint32_t mask, const bool value); I now have a very thorough understanding of the project. Let me summarize what I know:

**Project: vivadoIP_psi_ms_daq**
- A Xilinx Vivado IP-core (IP-XACT) that wraps the VHDL implementation of the multi-stream data acquisition engine (`psi_multi_stream_daq`) into a packaged Vivado IP for use in Vivado Block Design (IPI).
- Functionality: generic multi-stream data acquisition engine that writes data directly into AXI-attached memory (e.g. DDR). Up to 16 streams, up to 32 triggers/windows before SW reads, linear/ring-buffer modes, high-bandwidth (64-bit internal datapath → 2 GB/s @ 250MHz).

**Key files / structure:**
1. `README.md` - project info, license, dependencies (psi_common, psi_multi_stream_daq, etc.), description
2. `Changelog.md` - version history (1.0.0 → 1.2.1)
3. `License.txt` / `LGPL2_1.txt` - licensing
4. `hdl/psi_ms_daq_vivado.vhd` - **core wrapper VHDL**: maps the 16 individual generic stream ports (Stream0Width_g..Stream15Width_g etc.) into arrays, instantiates `psi_ms_daq_axi` (the actual implementation from the other repo). Contains generics, ports (AXI slave for register access, AXI master for memory, stream inputs Str00..Str15, IRQ, Trig).
5. `scripts/package.tcl` - **IP packaging script** using PsiIpPackage: defines IP name/version (1.2), adds source files & psi_common/psi_multi_stream_daq library files, copies driver, defines GUI parameters (pages), defines port enablement conditions, packages for xczu9eg.
6. `scripts/dependencies.py` - dependency resolution script (parses README, uses PsiFpgaLibDependencies).
7. `xgui/psi_ms_daq_axi_v1_2.tcl` - auto-generated Vivado IP GUI parameter layout.
8. `bd/bd.tcl` - block-design hook for AXI ID_WIDTH propagation (init/pre_propagate/propagate procs).
9. `component.xml` - **IP-XACT component description** (154 parameters, bus interfaces: aximm, axis, clock, interrupt, reset).
10. `drivers/psi_ms_daq_axi/` - **Linux/baremetal C driver**:
    - `src/psi_ms_daq.h` - driver API (init, stream configure, window handling, IRQ handling - window-based vs stream-based, register definitions)
    - `src/psi_ms_daq.c` - driver implementation (handle structs, register access abstraction, IRQ handler loop, data unwrap logic)
    - `src/Makefile` - build integration with Xilinx BSP (libxil.a)
    - `data/psi_ms_daq_axi.mdd` - driver definition (BSP integration)
    - `data/psi_ms_daq_axi.tcl` - xparameters.h generation
11. `refdesign/ZCU102/` - **reference design** for ZCU102 board:
    - `project.tcl` - Vivado project recreation script
    - `src/system_wrapper.vhd` - BD wrapper
    - `constraints/timing.xdc` - clock crossing constraints
    - `Sdk/app/src/main.c` - **example C application** using the driver (init 2 streams, IRQ callbacks, trigger generation menu)
    - `Sdk/hw/system.hdf`, `Sdk/bsp/`, etc. - Xilinx SDK workspace artifacts
12. `doc/` - documentation (ReferenceDesignUserGuide.pdf, ip_core_doc.html, driver_doc.html, GettingStarted.vsd)

**Register map (from driver):**
- General config: GCFG (0x000), GSTAT (0x004), IRQVEC (0x010), IRQENA (0x014), STRENA (0x020)
- Per stream (n): MAXLVL (0x200+0x10*n), POSTTRIG (0x204+...), MODE (0x208+...), LASTWIN (0x20C+...)
- Context memory per stream (n): SCFG (0x1000+0x20*n), BUFSTART (0x1004+...), WINSIZE (0x1008+...), PTR (0x100C+...), WINEND (0x1010+...)
- Window (n,w): WINCNT (0x4000+so*n+0x10*w), LAST, TSLO, TSHI

content.text: 我已经彻底了解了这个项目。这是一个 Xilinx Vivado IP-core (IP-XACT) 封装，它将来自 Paul Scherrer Institute 的 `psi_multi_stream_daq` VHDL 多流数据采集引擎封装成一个可重用的 Vivado IP，包含一个 C 驱动程序和一个 ZCU102 参考设计。现在我将制定学习手册的清单。

input.head: c210e3ff7e1ea1066502a5cbc8be4f33e0fae3f7
input.rationale: 本项目本身只是一个"Vivado IP 封装层"：它把另一个仓库（psi_multi_stream_daq）的 VHDL 实现包装成可在 Vivado Block Design 中例化的 IP-Core，并附带 Linux/baremetal C 驱动和 ZCU102 参考设计。因此学习路线按"先认清定位 → 再读 VHDL 封装 → 再读驱动与寄存器 → 再看数据采集/中断/窗口机制 → 最后端到端集成"五段递进。单元 1（入门）让读者理解项目定位、目录结构、依赖关系与 IP 打包流程；单元 2（进阶）聚焦唯一的 RTL 文件 psi_ms_daq_vivado.vhd——它的泛型/端口、标量到数组的映射、对 psi_ms_daq_axi 的例化以及 BD 中 AXI ID 的传递；单元 3（进阶）进入 C 驱动，讲清寄存器映射、句柄数据模型、初始化与寄存器访问抽象、流配置流程；单元 4（专家）讲数据采集的核心机制——录制模式/窗口/环形缓冲、窗口式 vs 流式中断、窗口数据去环绕回拷贝、寄存器字段助手与返回码；单元 5（专家）用 ZCU102 参考设计把前面的 IP、驱动、中断、数据回读串成一条完整链路，并补充 IP-XACT(component.xml) 与驱动 BSP 集成。这样依赖关系清晰：RTL 封装依赖对项目结构的认知，驱动依赖寄存器映射，采集机制依赖驱动与流配置，参考设计是所有前置知识的综合验收。全仓库 41 个文件、规模偏小但横跨 VHDL/TCL/C/IP-XACT 多种语言，故拆为 18 讲，避免硬拆同时保证每个主题独立。

lectures.title: 项目定位：psi_ms_daq 是什么、这个仓库做什么
lectures.topic: 介绍多流数据采集 IP-Core 的功能（最多 16 路 AXI-Stream 输入、最多 32 个触发窗口、线性/环形缓冲、经 AXI 直接写内存），并说明本仓库只是 psi_multi_stream_daq VHDL 实现的 Vivado 封装层。
learning_goals: 理解 psi_ms_daq IP-Core 解决什么问题（多通道采集直写 DDR）
区分本仓库（Vivado IP 封装）与 psi_multi_stream_daq（功能实现）的职责边界
了解许可证（PSI HDL Library License / LGPL）与版本号约定
minimal_modules: README 中的 Description 与 Important Note
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 README 的 Description 和 Important Note 两节，用一段话写出：本仓库为何只是封装层、真正的功能逻辑放在哪里、并指出当前版本号（1.2.1）相对 1.2.0 修复了什么。

lectures.title: 仓库目录结构与关键文件导览
lectures.topic: 按目录讲解 hdl、scripts、xgui、bd、drivers、refdesign、doc、component.xml 各自的作用，建立整体地图。
learning_goals: 列出各顶层目录（hdl/scripts/xgui/bd/drivers/refdesign/doc）的职责
识别出 RTL 入口、IP 打包脚本、驱动源码、参考设计入口分别在哪
理解 component.xml 作为 IP-XACT 描述总入口的地位
minimal_modules: package.tcl 与 component.xml 的关系
lectures.practice_task: 画一张目录树，在每个目录旁标注一句话职责；再标注出 RTL 唯一文件、IP 打包脚本、C 驱动头文件、ZCU102 参考应用的 main.c 的完整路径。

lectures.title: 依赖关系与获取全部源码
lectures.topic: 讲解 README 中被自动解析的 Dependencies 段（psi_common、psi_multi_stream_daq、PsiIpPackage 等），以及 scripts/dependencies.py 如何解析 README 并拉取依赖。
learning_goals: 理解 psi_common 与 psi_multi_stream_daq 是运行时必需的 VHDL 依赖
区分运行依赖与开发依赖（PsiSim/PsiIpPackage/psi_tb）
掌握 dependencies.py 的工作方式（FromReadme + ExecMain）
minimal_modules: README Dependencies 段（被解析标记包裹）
package.tcl 中的 add_lib_relative 列表
lectures.practice_task: 在 package.tcl 的 add_lib_relative 列表中，把每个文件归类到 psi_common、psi_multi_stream_daq 两类，并说明哪些属于运行时（被综合进 IP）、哪些仅是开发期依赖。

lectures.title: IP 打包流程总览：从 RTL 到可例化 IP
lectures.topic: 以 scripts/package.tcl 为主线，讲解用 PsiIpPackage 把 VHDL 封装成 Vivado IP-Core 的整体步骤：命名/版本、添加源文件与库文件、定义 GUI 参数与端口使能、最后 package_ip。
learning_goals: 理解 IP_NAME/IP_VERSION/IP_LIBRARY 等元信息如何设定
掌握 add_sources_relative 与 add_lib_relative 的区别
了解 GUI 页面、参数控件、端口使能条件之间的协作
认识 package_ip 最终产物（目标器件 xczu9eg、是否综合）
lectures.practice_task: 通读 package.tcl，按顺序写出打包一个 IP 需要的 5 个步骤（元信息→源文件→驱动→GUI 参数→端口使能→package_ip），并说明 xgui 下的 .tcl 文件是手工写的还是打包工具自动生成的。

lectures.title: 封装实体：泛型与端口全景
lectures.topic: 精读 hdl/psi_ms_daq_vivado.vhd 的 entity 声明：通用配置泛型（Streams_g/TsPerStream_g/UseLastAsTrigger_g）、录制泛型（IntDataWidth_g/MaxWindows_g/BurstSize）、AXI 泛型、每路流 Stream0..15 的 7 个泛型、以及 AXI Slave/Master/流输入/中断/触发端口。
learning_goals: 区分通用配置、录制、AXI、逐流四组泛型
理解为什么 16 路流要展开成 16 组泛型而不是数组（Vivado IP 接口要求）
识别 AXI Slave（寄存器）、AXI Master（写内存）、AXI-Stream 输入、IRQ、Trig 等端口分组
了解 Str00..Str15 每路流含 Clk/TData/Ts/TValid/TReady/TLast 六类信号
minimal_modules: entity psi_ms_daq_vivado 的 generic 区
entity 的 port 区（AXI/流/中断）
package.tcl GUI 参数与泛型的对应
lectures.practice_task: 从 entity 中列出三组泛型（通用/AXI/逐流），并解释 IntDataWidth_g 的约束『max(流宽) <= 内部宽度 <= AXI 主宽度』来自哪里（package.tcl 的提示文本）。

lectures.title: 标量到数组的映射：generate 块与时间戳/触发选择
lectures.topic: 讲解架构体如何用 All_Clk/All_Data/All_Ts/All_Vld/All_Rdy/All_Lst 等固定 16 路数组信号，逐行连接 Str00..Str15；再用 g_stream/g_tsstr/g_ntrig/g_trig/g_ntrig 等 generate 块按 Streams_g、TsPerStream_g、UseLastAsTrigger_g 动态裁剪出实际使用的 Str_* 数组与 trigger。
learning_goals: 理解为何先映射到固定 16 路的 All_* 信号再裁剪到 Streams_g 路
掌握 g_stream generate 把 All_* 投影到 Str_* 的写法
理解 TsPerStream_g 决定时间戳来自各流(All_Ts)还是共用 StrX_Ts
理解 UseLastAsTrigger_g 决定 trigger 取自 Str_Lst 还是外部 Trig 端口
minimal_modules: All_* 信号声明（rtl 架构体）
Str00..Str15 到 All_* 的逐行赋值
g_stream / g_tsstr / g_ntsstr / g_trig / g_ntrig generate 块
lectures.practice_task: 画出 TsPerStream_g=false、UseLastAsTrigger_g=true、Streams_g=3 三种开关下，Str_Ts 与 trigger 这两个信号分别连到了哪些源信号（StrX_Ts？All_Ts？Str_Lst？Trig？）。

lectures.title: 例化 psi_ms_daq_axi 与配置转换
lectures.topic: 讲解 i_impl : entity work.psi_ms_daq_axi 的例化：如何用 TimeoutUs_c/TimeoutsSec_c/FreqHz_c/FreqReal_c 常量与函数把逐流泛型聚合成数组型 generic（StreamWidth_g/StreamPrio_g/StreamBuffer_g/StreamTimeout_g/StreamClkFreq_g/StreamTsFifoDepth_g/StreamUseTs_g），并把 AXI Slave/Master、流数组、trigger、Irq 端口对应连接。
learning_goals: 理解逐流标量泛型如何聚合成实现端需要的数组型泛型
掌握 TimeoutUs_c→TimeoutsSec_c、FreqHz_c→FreqReal_c 的单位换算（微秒→秒、整数→实数）
理解 C_S_Axi_ID_WIDTH 如何透传为实现的 AxiSlaveIdWidth_g
看清 Str_Clk/Str_Data/Str_Ts/Str_Vld/Str_Rdy/Str_Trig/Irq 与实现端口的一一连接
minimal_modules: i_impl 的 generic map 与 port map
bd.tcl 中 AXI ID_WIDTH 的 init/pre_propagate/propagate
lectures.practice_task: 对照 i_impl 的 generic map，写出 StreamTimeout_g 数组第一个元素的值是如何由 Stream0TimeoutUs_g 经过 TimeoutsSec_c→TimeoutsSec_c 计算得到的（注意除以 1.0e6）；并说明 bd.tcl 为什么要传播 ID_WIDTH。

units.title: C 驱动架构与寄存器映射

lectures.title: 寄存器映射全景
lectures.topic: 精读 drivers/psi_ms_daq_axi/src/psi_ms_daq.h 的寄存器宏定义：通用寄存器（GCFG/GSTAT/IRQVEC/IRQENA/STRENA）、逐流寄存器（MAXLVL/POSTTRIG/MODE/LASTWIN，基址 0x200+0x10*n）、上下文寄存器（SCFG/BUFSTART/WINSIZE/PTR/WINEND，基址 0x1000+0x20*n）、窗口寄存器（WINCNT/LAST/TSLO/TSHI，基址 0x4000+so*n+0x10*w）及各比特字段。
learning_goals: 掌握四类地址空间：通用/逐流录制/逐流上下文/窗口的基址与步进公式
理解 IRQVEC/IRQENA/STRENA/GCFG_BIT_ENA 等关键使能位
看懂 WINCNT 寄存器中 CNT[30:0] 与 ISTRIG[31] 的含义
理解窗口地址偏移 strAddrOffs 的来源（取决于 maxWindows 的 2 的幂）
minimal_modules: psi_ms_daq.h 的 PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_* / PSI_MS_DAQ_CTX_* / PSI_MS_DAQ_WIN_* 宏
psi_ms_daq.c 中 strAddrOffs 的计算
lectures.practice_task: 写出 stream=2、window=5、maxWindows=16 时寄存器 PSI_MS_DAQ_WIN_WINCNT、TSLO、TSHI 的字节地址；并说明 strAddrOffs 的数值。

lectures.title: 驱动数据模型与句柄抽象
lectures.topic: 讲解 psi_ms_daq.c 的核心类型 PsiMsDaq_Inst_t（IP 实例：baseAddr/maxStreams/maxWindows/strAddrOffs/streams 数组/三种访问函数指针）与 PsiMsDaq_StrInst_t（流实例：nr/isConfigured/widthBytes/windows/lastProcWin/irqCalledWin/回调与缓冲参数），以及 PsiMsDaq_IpHandle/PsiMsDaq_StrHandle 这两个 void* 句柄和栈上 WinInfo_t 的设计。
learning_goals: 理解 IP 句柄与流句柄实际上是结构体指针的 void* 别名
掌握流实例中记录的软件状态（isConfigured/lastProcWin/irqCalledWin/回调）
理解为何把访问函数（regWrite/regRead/dataCopy）做成可注入指针
区分句柄（堆/长生命周期）与 WinInfo_t（栈/瞬时）
lectures.practice_task: 画出一次 PsiMsDaq_GetStrHandle(ip, 2, &str) 调用后，ip 句柄与 str 句柄指向的内存关系；并说明 str->ipHandle 这个回指指针的作用。

lectures.title: 初始化与寄存器访问抽象
lectures.topic: 精读 PsiMsDaq_Init（malloc 实例、计算 strAddrOffs、注入或使用默认访问函数、禁用全部流/IRQ、清零 MaxLvl 与窗口计数、最后置 GCFG 使能位），以及 PsiMsDaq_RegWrite/RegRead 如何叠加 baseAddr 调用注入的访问函数，外加默认 PsiMsDaq_RegWrite_Standard/RegRead_Standard/DataCopy_Standard 的裸指针实现。
learning_goals: 掌握 Init 的完整复位序列与为何要在末尾置 GCFG_BIT_ENA|IRQENA
理解 strAddrOffs = Pow(2,Log2Ceil(maxWindows))*0x10 的含义
看懂默认访问函数如何用 volatile 指针直接读写物理地址
理解注入访问函数（AccessFct_t）带来的可移植性（裸机/带 MMU/仿真）
lectures.practice_task: 解释为什么默认 PsiMsDaq_RegRead_Standard 能直接用于 Zynq 裸机（提示：volatile + 物理地址）；并说明在 Linux 用户态或仿真环境下应该如何通过 accessFct_p 注入自定义读函数。

lectures.title: 流配置流程：从结构体到寄存器
lectures.topic: 精读 PsiMsDaq_Str_Configure：参数校验（宽度必须是 8 的倍数、winCnt<=maxWindows、winSize 必须是采样倍数、流必须先禁用），然后把 postTrigSamples/recMode/ringbuf/overwrite/bufStart/winSize/winCnt 写入对应寄存器，并更新流实例的软件缓存字段。
learning_goals: 掌握 StrConfig_t 各字段到寄存器的映射关系
理解为何配置前流必须处于禁用状态（CheckStrDisabled）
看清 winCnt 写入时减 1（winCnt-1）的寄存器编码约定
了解配置同时缓存 widthBytes/windows/bufStart/postTrig/winSize 供后续窗口读取使用
lectures.practice_task: 对照 main.c 中 cfg0（postTrig=5, ringbuf=true, overwrite=false, winCnt=3, bufStart=0x40000000, winSize=32, width=16）写出 PsiMsDaq_Str_Configure 内部对 stream0 各寄存器写入的（地址, 值）序列，并指出 winCnt 字段最终写入的值。

units.title: 数据采集、窗口与中断机制

lectures.title: 录制模式与窗口/环形缓冲概念
lectures.topic: 讲解 PsiMsDaq_RecMode_t 四种录制模式（Continuous/TriggerMask/SingleShot/Manual）与 Arm 位的关系，以及窗口（Window）概念：每流多个窗口、线性 vs 环形缓冲（winAsRingbuf）、覆盖策略（winOverwrite）、触发前后采样数（pre/postTrig）。
learning_goals: 区分四种录制模式的触发行为与 Arm 位的作用时机
理解窗口作为独立录制单元的含义与 winCnt 的作用
掌握环形缓冲（ringbuf）与线性缓冲在数据布局上的差别
理解 pre/post trigger 与 ISTRIG 标志的关系
lectures.practice_task: 为四种录制模式各举一个真实采集场景（如 Continuous 用于持续监控、SingleShot 用于捕获单次瞬态），并说明在 TriggerMask 模式下 Arm 被置位前后的行为差异。

lectures.title: 中断处理：窗口式 vs 流式两种方案
lectures.topic: 精读 PsiMsDaq_HandleIrq：读 IRQVEC 判断哪条流有中断并回写清除，对使用 irqFctStr 的流直接调用流回调；对使用 irqFctWin 的流，循环推进 lastProcWin→lastWrittenWin 之间的新窗口，用 irqCalledWin 位图防止对未释放窗口重复回调，逐个构造栈上 WinInfo_t 调用窗口回调。
learning_goals: 掌握两种 IRQ 方案（窗口式 vs 流式）的适用条件与互斥性
理解 IRQVEC 读改写清除的电平中断应答机制
看懂 irqCalledWin 位图如何保证每个窗口回调恰好一次且屏蔽伪中断
理解 PsiMsDaq_StrWin_MarkAsFree 清除 irqCalledWin 位的协作
minimal_modules: 头文件中 Window based IRQ / Stream based IRQ 说明
lectures.practice_task: 描述一次连续到来 3 个新窗口（窗口 0/1/2）但用户尚未 MarkAsFree 任何窗口时，HandleIrq 会调用几次窗口回调、irqCalledWin 的值如何变化、以及下一次相同 IRQ 会发生什么（伪中断被屏蔽）。

lectures.title: 窗口数据回读与去环绕回拷贝
lectures.topic: 精读 PsiMsDaq_StrWin_GetDataUnwrapped 与相关窗口读取函数：从 WINCNT 取采样数、从 ISTRIG 判断含触发并算 preTrig、由 LASTWIN/lastSplAddr 反推触发字节与末字节地址、判断是否跨越窗口边界，分别用单次或两次（首尾拼接）memcpy 把环形缓冲数据展开为线性顺序。
learning_goals: 掌握 GetNoOfSamples/GetPreTrigSamples/GetTimestamp/GetLastSplAddr 的寄存器来源
理解环形缓冲下触发字节地址可能需要 +winSize 回绕的修正
看懂当数据横跨窗口末尾与开头时为何要分两段拷贝
理解 buffer 大小、postTrig 上限、preTrig 上限三类校验的作用
lectures.practice_task: 给定 winStart=0x40000000、winSize=32、postTrig=5、widthBytes=2、lastSplAddr=0x40000006，请手算触发字节地址 trigByteAddr 与末字节地址 lastByteAddr，并判断 GetDataUnwrapped(pre=5,post=5) 会走单次拷贝还是两段拼接分支。

lectures.title: 寄存器字段/比特助手、SAFE_CALL 与返回码
lectures.topic: 讲解驱动的底层工具：PsiMsDaq_RegSetField/RegGetField/RegSetBit/RegGetBit 的读改写（RMW）实现与掩码计算、SAFE_CALL 宏的错误短路传播、CheckStrNr/CheckWinNr/CheckStrDisabled 等守卫函数，以及完整的 PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t 返回码集合与每个码对应的出错场景。
learning_goals: 掌握 RMW 风格的字段/比特读改写实现与掩码边界处理
理解 SAFE_CALL 宏如何把任意返回非 Success 的调用短路返回上层
看清每个 RetCode 对应的非法输入/状态场景
了解高级调试函数 RegWrite/RegRead/RegSetField 的用途与风险
lectures.practice_task: 写一个调用序列：对一条已使能的流调用 PsiMsDaq_Str_Configure，预期返回哪个 RetCode？再说明若传入 streamWidthBits=12 会返回哪个码、winSize 与采样数不对齐时返回哪个码。

units.title: 参考设计与端到端集成

lectures.title: 参考设计：Vivado 工程与时钟域
lectures.topic: 讲解 refdesign/ZCU102：project.tcl 如何重建 Vivado 工程、src/system_wrapper.vhd 作为 Block Design 顶层、constraints/timing.xdc 中针对 AXI 时钟与各流时钟之间 set_max_delay 的异步时钟域跨越约束（clk_pl_0/1/2）。
learning_goals: 理解 project.tcl 重建工程的流程与 origin_dir 机制
掌握 system_wrapper.vhd 作为 BD 顶层的角色
看懂 timing.xdc 中 set_max_delay -datapath_only 的 CDC 约束写法与 7ns/8ns 取值依据（最快时钟周期）
理解为何每条流可以有独立时钟（Str00_Clk..）而 IP 内部做跨时钟处理
minimal_modules: project.tcl 的目录/工程名设定
timing.xdc 的 CDC 约束块
lectures.practice_task: 根据 timing.xdc 的注释推算三条时钟（clk_axi/clk_stream0/clk_stream1）的大致频率，并解释为什么 set_max_delay 取值要用『更快时钟的 1 个周期』而不是某个固定纳秒。

lectures.title: 参考设计：端到端 C 应用主程序
lectures.topic: 精读 refdesign/ZCU102/Sdk/app/src/main.c：用 axis_data_gen 产生两路测试数据 → PsiMsDaq_Init/GetStrHandle/Str_Configure/SetIrqCallbackWin/SetIrqEnable/SetEnable 完成初始化 → XScuGic 注册电平中断 → Str0Irq/Str1Irq 回调里做 DCache 失效、取时间戳、GetDataUnwrapped 回读并校验、MarkAsFree；主循环菜单触发 sporadic triggers。
learning_goals: 掌握一次完整的『初始化→使能→中断回读→释放窗口』调用链
理解为何读取 DDR 数据前必须 Xil_DCacheInvalidateRange
看清电平敏感 IRQ 的 GIC 配置（priority/trigger type/connect/enable）
理解 Str1Irq 中对回读数据做连续性校验的逻辑与 100000 回绕
minimal_modules: main() 的 GIC 配置与菜单触发循环
lectures.practice_task: 把 main.c 的 Init() 改造要点列成清单：若把流 1 改为 winOverwrite=true，应改用哪种 IRQ 回调注册函数（SetIrqCallbackStr）？相应回调里还需要做哪些调整（提示：窗口式 IRQ 与 overwrite 不兼容）？

lectures.title: IP-XACT 描述与驱动 BSP 集成
lectures.topic: 讲解 component.xml 作为 IP-XACT 产物：154 个参数、busType（aximm 主/从、axis 流、clock/reset/interrupt 信号）与文件组的组织；以及驱动如何被 Vitis/XSDK BSP 集成：data/psi_ms_daq_axi.mdd 声明 supported_peripherals、data/psi_ms_daq_axi.tcl 生成 xparameters.h、src/Makefile 把驱动编进 libxil.a。
learning_goals: 理解 component.xml 中 aximm/axis/clock/reset/interrupt 五类总线接口的来源（由 package.tcl 与 bd.tcl 共同生成）
掌握 16 路 AXI-Stream 接口与端口使能条件的对应
看清 .mdd 文件声明外设名 psi_ms_daq_axi 如何让 BSP 识别该驱动
理解 .tcl 的 generate 过程把 C_BASEADDR/C_HIGHADDR 写入 xparameters.h 的机制
了解 Makefile 如何把 *.c 编进 libxil.a 供应用链接
minimal_modules: component.xml 的 busInterfaces 与 parameters 概览
lectures.practice_task: 解释从 package.tcl 打包到 Vitis 工程能 #include "psi_ms_daq.h" 并链接成功的完整链路：打包生成 component.xml → BSP 依据 .mdd 选中驱动 → .tcl 生成 xparameters.h（含 XPAR_PSI_MS_DAQ_BASEADDR）→ Makefile 编入 libxil.a。

data.head: c210e3ff7e1ea1066502a5cbc8be4f33e0fae3f7
data.rationale: 本项目本身只是一个"Vivado IP 封装层"：它把另一个仓库（psi_multi_stream_daq）的 VHDL 实现包装成可在 Vivado Block Design 中例化的 IP-Core，并附带 Linux/baremetal C 驱动和 ZCU102 参考设计。因此学习路线按"先认清定位 → 再读 VHDL 封装 → 再读驱动与寄存器 → 再看数据采集/中断/窗口机制 → 最后端到端集成"五段递进。单元 1（入门）让读者理解项目定位、目录结构、依赖关系与 IP 打包流程；单元 2（进阶）聚焦唯一的 RTL 文件 psi_ms_daq_vivado.vhd——它的泛型/端口、标量到数组的映射、对 psi_ms_daq_axi 的例化以及 BD 中 AXI ID 的传递；单元 3（进阶）进入 C 驱动，讲清寄存器映射、句柄数据模型、初始化与寄存器访问抽象、流配置流程；单元 4（专家）讲数据采集的核心机制——录制模式/窗口/环形缓冲、窗口式 vs 流式中断、窗口数据去环绕回拷贝、寄存器字段助手与返回码；单元 5（专家）用 ZCU102 参考设计把前面的 IP、驱动、中断、数据回读串成一条完整链路，并补充 IP-XACT(component.xml) 与驱动 BSP 集成。这样依赖关系清晰：RTL 封装依赖对项目结构的认知，驱动依赖寄存器映射，采集机制依赖驱动与流配置，参考设计是所有前置知识的综合验收。全仓库 41 个文件、规模偏小但横跨 VHDL/TCL/C/IP-XACT 多种语言，故拆为 18 讲，避免硬拆同时保证每个主题独立。

lectures.title: 项目定位：psi_ms_daq 是什么、这个仓库做什么
lectures.topic: 介绍多流数据采集 IP-Core 的功能（最多 16 路 AXI-Stream 输入、最多 32 个触发窗口、线性/环形缓冲、经 AXI 直接写内存），并说明本仓库只是 psi_multi_stream_daq VHDL 实现的 Vivado 封装层。
learning_goals: 理解 psi_ms_daq IP-Core 解决什么问题（多通道采集直写 DDR）
区分本仓库（Vivado IP 封装）与 psi_multi_stream_daq（功能实现）的职责边界
了解许可证（PSI HDL Library License / LGPL）与版本号约定
minimal_modules: README 中的 Description 与 Important Note
lectures.practice_task: 阅读 README 的 Description 和 Important Note 两节，用一段话写出：本仓库为何只是封装层、真正的功能逻辑放在哪里、并指出当前版本号（1.2.1）相对 1.2.0 修复了什么。

lectures.title: 仓库目录结构与关键文件导览
lectures.topic: 按目录讲解 hdl、scripts、xgui、bd、drivers、refdesign、doc、component.xml 各自的作用，建立整体地图。
learning_goals: 列出各顶层目录（hdl/scripts/xgui/bd/drivers/refdesign/doc）的职责
识别出 RTL 入口、IP 打包脚本、驱动源码、参考设计入口分别在哪
理解 component.xml 作为 IP-XACT 描述总入口的地位
minimal_modules: package.tcl 与 component.xml 的关系
lectures.practice_task: 画一张目录树，在每个目录旁标注一句话职责；再标注出 RTL 唯一文件、IP 打包脚本、C 驱动头文件、ZCU102 参考应用的 main.c 的完整路径。

lectures.title: 依赖关系与获取全部源码
lectures.topic: 讲解 README 中被自动解析的 Dependencies 段（psi_common、psi_multi_stream_daq、PsiIpPackage 等），以及 scripts/dependencies.py 如何解析 README 并拉取依赖。
learning_goals: 理解 psi_common 与 psi_multi_stream_daq 是运行时必需的 VHDL 依赖
区分运行依赖与开发依赖（PsiSim/PsiIpPackage/psi_tb）
掌握 dependencies.py 的工作方式（FromReadme + ExecMain）
minimal_modules: README Dependencies 段（被解析标记包裹）
package.tcl 中的 add_lib_relative 列表
lectures.practice_task: 在 package.tcl 的 add_lib_relative 列表中，把每个文件归类到 psi_common、psi_multi_stream_daq 两类，并说明哪些属于运行时（被综合进 IP）、哪些仅是开发期依赖。

lectures.title: IP 打包流程总览：从 RTL 到可例化 IP
lectures.topic: 以 scripts/package.tcl 为主线，讲解用 PsiIpPackage 把 VHDL 封装成 Vivado IP-Core 的整体步骤：命名/版本、添加源文件与库文件、定义 GUI 参数与端口使能、最后 package_ip。
learning_goals: 理解 IP_NAME/IP_VERSION/IP_LIBRARY 等元信息如何设定
掌握 add_sources_relative 与 add_lib_relative 的区别
了解 GUI 页面、参数控件、端口使能条件之间的协作
认识 package_ip 最终产物（目标器件 xczu9eg、是否综合）
lectures.practice_task: 通读 package.tcl，按顺序写出打包一个 IP 需要的 5 个步骤（元信息→源文件→驱动→GUI 参数→端口使能→package_ip），并说明 xgui 下的 .tcl 文件是手工写的还是打包工具自动生成的。

lectures.title: 封装实体：泛型与端口全景
lectures.topic: 精读 hdl/psi_ms_daq_vivado.vhd 的 entity 声明：通用配置泛型（Streams_g/TsPerStream_g/UseLastAsTrigger_g）、录制泛型（IntDataWidth_g/MaxWindows_g/BurstSize）、AXI 泛型、每路流 Stream0..15 的 7 个泛型、以及 AXI Slave/Master/流输入/中断/触发端口。
learning_goals: 区分通用配置、录制、AXI、逐流四组泛型
理解为什么 16 路流要展开成 16 组泛型而不是数组（Vivado IP 接口要求）
识别 AXI Slave（寄存器）、AXI Master（写内存）、AXI-Stream 输入、IRQ、Trig 等端口分组
了解 Str00..Str15 每路流含 Clk/TData/Ts/TValid/TReady/TLast 六类信号
minimal_modules: entity psi_ms_daq_vivado 的 generic 区
entity 的 port 区（AXI/流/中断）
package.tcl GUI 参数与泛型的对应
lectures.practice_task: 从 entity 中列出三组泛型（通用/AXI/逐流），并解释 IntDataWidth_g 的约束『max(流宽) <= 内部宽度 <= AXI 主宽度』来自哪里（package.tcl 的提示文本）。

lectures.title: 标量到数组的映射：generate 块与时间戳/触发选择
lectures.topic: 讲解架构体如何用 All_Clk/All_Data/All_Ts/All_Vld/All_Rdy/All_Lst 等固定 16 路数组信号，逐行连接 Str00..Str15；再用 g_stream/g_tsstr/g_ntrig/g_trig/g_ntrig 等 generate 块按 Streams_g、TsPerStream_g、UseLastAsTrigger_g 动态裁剪出实际使用的 Str_* 数组与 trigger。
learning_goals: 理解为何先映射到固定 16 路的 All_* 信号再裁剪到 Streams_g 路
掌握 g_stream generate 把 All_* 投影到 Str_* 的写法
理解 TsPerStream_g 决定时间戳来自各流(All_Ts)还是共用 StrX_Ts
理解 UseLastAsTrigger_g 决定 trigger 取自 Str_Lst 还是外部 Trig 端口
minimal_modules: All_* 信号声明（rtl 架构体）
Str00..Str15 到 All_* 的逐行赋值
g_stream / g_tsstr / g_ntsstr / g_trig / g_ntrig generate 块
lectures.practice_task: 画出 TsPerStream_g=false、UseLastAsTrigger_g=true、Streams_g=3 三种开关下，Str_Ts 与 trigger 这两个信号分别连到了哪些源信号（StrX_Ts？All_Ts？Str_Lst？Trig？）。

lectures.title: 例化 psi_ms_daq_axi 与配置转换
lectures.topic: 讲解 i_impl : entity work.psi_ms_daq_axi 的例化：如何用 TimeoutUs_c/TimeoutsSec_c/FreqHz_c/FreqReal_c 常量与函数把逐流泛型聚合成数组型 generic（StreamWidth_g/StreamPrio_g/StreamBuffer_g/StreamTimeout_g/StreamClkFreq_g/StreamTsFifoDepth_g/StreamUseTs_g），并把 AXI Slave/Master、流数组、trigger、Irq 端口对应连接。
learning_goals: 理解逐流标量泛型如何聚合成实现端需要的数组型泛型
掌握 TimeoutUs_c→TimeoutsSec_c、FreqHz_c→FreqReal_c 的单位换算（微秒→秒、整数→实数）
理解 C_S_Axi_ID_WIDTH 如何透传为实现的 AxiSlaveIdWidth_g
看清 Str_Clk/Str_Data/Str_Ts/Str_Vld/Str_Rdy/Str_Trig/Irq 与实现端口的一一连接
minimal_modules: i_impl 的 generic map 与 port map
bd.tcl 中 AXI ID_WIDTH 的 init/pre_propagate/propagate
lectures.practice_task: 对照 i_impl 的 generic map，写出 StreamTimeout_g 数组第一个元素的值是如何由 Stream0TimeoutUs_g 经过 TimeoutsSec_c→TimeoutsSec_c 计算得到的（注意除以 1.0e6）；并说明 bd.tcl 为什么要传播 ID_WIDTH。

units.title: C 驱动架构与寄存器映射

lectures.title: 寄存器映射全景
lectures.topic: 精读 drivers/psi_ms_daq_axi/src/psi_ms_daq.h 的寄存器宏定义：通用寄存器（GCFG/GSTAT/IRQVEC/IRQENA/STRENA）、逐流寄存器（MAXLVL/POSTTRIG/MODE/LASTWIN，基址 0x200+0x10*n）、上下文寄存器（SCFG/BUFSTART/WINSIZE/PTR/WINEND，基址 0x1000+0x20*n）、窗口寄存器（WINCNT/LAST/TSLO/TSHI，基址 0x4000+so*n+0x10*w）及各比特字段。
learning_goals: 掌握四类地址空间：通用/逐流录制/逐流上下文/窗口的基址与步进公式
理解 IRQVEC/IRQENA/STRENA/GCFG_BIT_ENA 等关键使能位
看懂 WINCNT 寄存器中 CNT[30:0] 与 ISTRIG[31] 的含义
理解窗口地址偏移 strAddrOffs 的来源（取决于 maxWindows 的 2 的幂）
minimal_modules: psi_ms_daq.h 的 PSI_MS_DAQ_REG_* / PSI_MS_DAQ_CTX_* / PSI_MS_DAQ_WIN_* 宏
psi_ms_daq.c 中 strAddrOffs 的计算
lectures.practice_task: 写出 stream=2、window=5、maxWindows=16 时寄存器 PSI_MS_DAQ_WIN_WINCNT、TSLO、TSHI 的字节地址；并说明 strAddrOffs 的数值。

lectures.title: 驱动数据模型与句柄抽象
lectures.topic: 讲解 psi_ms_daq.c 的核心类型 PsiMsDaq_Inst_t（IP 实例：baseAddr/maxStreams/maxWindows/strAddrOffs/streams 数组/三种访问函数指针）与 PsiMsDaq_StrInst_t（流实例：nr/isConfigured/widthBytes/windows/lastProcWin/irqCalledWin/回调与缓冲参数），以及 PsiMsDaq_IpHandle/PsiMsDaq_StrHandle 这两个 void* 句柄和栈上 WinInfo_t 的设计。
learning_goals: 理解 IP 句柄与流句柄实际上是结构体指针的 void* 别名
掌握流实例中记录的软件状态（isConfigured/lastProcWin/irqCalledWin/回调）
理解为何把访问函数（regWrite/regRead/dataCopy）做成可注入指针
区分句柄（堆/长生命周期）与 WinInfo_t（栈/瞬时）
lectures.practice_task: 画出一次 PsiMsDaq_GetStrHandle(ip, 2, &str) 调用后，ip 句柄与 str 句柄指向的内存关系；并说明 str->ipHandle 这个回指指针的作用。

lectures.title: 初始化与寄存器访问抽象
lectures.topic: 精读 PsiMsDaq_Init（malloc 实例、计算 strAddrOffs、注入或使用默认访问函数、禁用全部流/IRQ、清零 MaxLvl 与窗口计数、最后置 GCFG 使能位），以及 PsiMsDaq_RegWrite/RegRead 如何叠加 baseAddr 调用注入的访问函数，外加默认 PsiMsDaq_RegWrite_Standard/RegRead_Standard/DataCopy_Standard 的裸指针实现。
learning_goals: 掌握 Init 的完整复位序列与为何要在末尾置 GCFG_BIT_ENA|IRQENA
理解 strAddrOffs = Pow(2,Log2Ceil(maxWindows))*0x10 的含义
看懂默认访问函数如何用 volatile 指针直接读写物理地址
理解注入访问函数（AccessFct_t）带来的可移植性（裸机/带 MMU/仿真）
lectures.practice_task: 解释为什么默认 PsiMsDaq_RegRead_Standard 能直接用于 Zynq 裸机（提示：volatile + 物理地址）；并说明在 Linux 用户态或仿真环境下应该如何通过 accessFct_p 注入自定义读函数。

lectures.title: 流配置流程：从结构体到寄存器
lectures.topic: 精读 PsiMsDaq_Str_Configure：参数校验（宽度必须是 8 的倍数、winCnt<=maxWindows、winSize 必须是采样倍数、流必须先禁用），然后把 postTrigSamples/recMode/ringbuf/overwrite/bufStart/winSize/winCnt 写入对应寄存器，并更新流实例的软件缓存字段。
learning_goals: 掌握 StrConfig_t 各字段到寄存器的映射关系
理解为何配置前流必须处于禁用状态（CheckStrDisabled）
看清 winCnt 写入时减 1（winCnt-1）的寄存器编码约定
了解配置同时缓存 widthBytes/windows/bufStart/postTrig/winSize 供后续窗口读取使用
lectures.practice_task: 对照 main.c 中 cfg0（postTrig=5, ringbuf=true, overwrite=false, winCnt=3, bufStart=0x40000000, winSize=32, width=16）写出 PsiMsDaq_Str_Configure 内部对 stream0 各寄存器写入的（地址, 值）序列，并指出 winCnt 字段最终写入的值。

units.title: 数据采集、窗口与中断机制

lectures.title: 录制模式与窗口/环形缓冲概念
lectures.topic: 讲解 PsiMsDaq_RecMode_t 四种录制模式（Continuous/TriggerMask/SingleShot/Manual）与 Arm 位的关系，以及窗口（Window）概念：每流多个窗口、线性 vs 环形缓冲（winAsRingbuf）、覆盖策略（winOverwrite）、触发前后采样数（pre/postTrig）。
learning_goals: 区分四种录制模式的触发行为与 Arm 位的作用时机
理解窗口作为独立录制单元的含义与 winCnt 的作用
掌握环形缓冲（ringbuf）与线性缓冲在数据布局上的差别
理解 pre/post trigger 与 ISTRIG 标志的关系
lectures.practice_task: 为四种录制模式各举一个真实采集场景（如 Continuous 用于持续监控、SingleShot 用于捕获单次瞬态），并说明在 TriggerMask 模式下 Arm 被置位前后的行为差异。

lectures.title: 中断处理：窗口式 vs 流式两种方案
lectures.topic: 精读 PsiMsDaq_HandleIrq：读 IRQVEC 判断哪条流有中断并回写清除，对使用 irqFctStr 的流直接调用流回调；对使用 irqFctWin 的流，循环推进 lastProcWin→lastWrittenWin 之间的新窗口，用 irqCalledWin 位图防止对未释放窗口重复回调，逐个构造栈上 WinInfo_t 调用窗口回调。
learning_goals: 掌握两种 IRQ 方案（窗口式 vs 流式）的适用条件与互斥性
理解 IRQVEC 读改写清除的电平中断应答机制
看懂 irqCalledWin 位图如何保证每个窗口回调恰好一次且屏蔽伪中断
理解 PsiMsDaq_StrWin_MarkAsFree 清除 irqCalledWin 位的协作
minimal_modules: 头文件中 Window based IRQ / Stream based IRQ 说明
lectures.practice_task: 描述一次连续到来 3 个新窗口（窗口 0/1/2）但用户尚未 MarkAsFree 任何窗口时，HandleIrq 会调用几次窗口回调、irqCalledWin 的值如何变化、以及下一次相同 IRQ 会发生什么（伪中断被屏蔽）。

lectures.title: 窗口数据回读与去环绕回拷贝
lectures.topic: 精读 PsiMsDaq_StrWin_GetDataUnwrapped 与相关窗口读取函数：从 WINCNT 取采样数、从 ISTRIG 判断含触发并算 preTrig、由 LASTWIN/lastSplAddr 反推触发字节与末字节地址、判断是否跨越窗口边界，分别用单次或两次（首尾拼接）memcpy 把环形缓冲数据展开为线性顺序。
learning_goals: 掌握 GetNoOfSamples/GetPreTrigSamples/GetTimestamp/GetLastSplAddr 的寄存器来源
理解环形缓冲下触发字节地址可能需要 +winSize 回绕的修正
看懂当数据横跨窗口末尾与开头时为何要分两段拷贝
理解 buffer 大小、postTrig 上限、preTrig 上限三类校验的作用
lectures.practice_task: 给定 winStart=0x40000000、winSize=32、postTrig=5、widthBytes=2、lastSplAddr=0x40000006，请手算触发字节地址 trigByteAddr 与末字节地址 lastByteAddr，并判断 GetDataUnwrapped(pre=5,post=5) 会走单次拷贝还是两段拼接分支。

lectures.title: 寄存器字段/比特助手、SAFE_CALL 与返回码
lectures.topic: 讲解驱动的底层工具：PsiMsDaq_RegSetField/RegGetField/RegSetBit/RegGetBit 的读改写（RMW）实现与掩码计算、SAFE_CALL 宏的错误短路传播、CheckStrNr/CheckWinNr/CheckStrDisabled 等守卫函数，以及完整的 PsiMsDaq_RetCode_t 返回码集合与每个码对应的出错场景。
learning_goals: 掌握 RMW 风格的字段/比特读改写实现与掩码边界处理
理解 SAFE_CALL 宏如何把任意返回非 Success 的调用短路返回上层
看清每个 RetCode 对应的非法输入/状态场景
了解高级调试函数 RegWrite/RegRead/RegSetField 的用途与风险
lectures.practice_task: 写一个调用序列：对一条已使能的流调用 PsiMsDaq_Str_Configure，预期返回哪个 RetCode？再说明若传入 streamWidthBits=12 会返回哪个码、winSize 与采样数不对齐时返回哪个码。

units.title: 参考设计与端到端集成

lectures.title: 参考设计：Vivado 工程与时钟域
lectures.topic: 讲解 refdesign/ZCU102：project.tcl 如何重建 Vivado 工程、src/system_wrapper.vhd 作为 Block Design 顶层、constraints/timing.xdc 中针对 AXI 时钟与各流时钟之间 set_max_delay 的异步时钟域跨越约束（clk_pl_0/1/2）。
learning_goals: 理解 project.tcl 重建工程的流程与 origin_dir 机制
掌握 system_wrapper.vhd 作为 BD 顶层的角色
看懂 timing.xdc 中 set_max_delay -datapath_only 的 CDC 约束写法与 7ns/8ns 取值依据（最快时钟周期）
理解为何每条流可以有独立时钟（Str00_Clk..）而 IP 内部做跨时钟处理
minimal_modules: project.tcl 的目录/工程名设定
timing.xdc 的 CDC 约束块
lectures.practice_task: 根据 timing.xdc 的注释推算三条时钟（clk_axi/clk_stream0/clk_stream1）的大致频率，并解释为什么 set_max_delay 取值要用『更快时钟的 1 个周期』而不是某个固定纳秒。

lectures.title: 参考设计：端到端 C 应用主程序
lectures.topic: 精读 refdesign/ZCU102/Sdk/app/src/main.c：用 axis_data_gen 产生两路测试数据 → PsiMsDaq_Init/GetStrHandle/Str_Configure/SetIrqCallbackWin/SetIrqEnable/SetEnable 完成初始化 → XScuGic 注册电平中断 → Str0Irq/Str1Irq 回调里做 DCache 失效、取时间戳、GetDataUnwrapped 回读并校验、MarkAsFree；主循环菜单触发 sporadic triggers。
learning_goals: 掌握一次完整的『初始化→使能→中断回读→释放窗口』调用链
理解为何读取 DDR 数据前必须 Xil_DCacheInvalidateRange
看清电平敏感 IRQ 的 GIC 配置（priority/trigger type/connect/enable）
理解 Str1Irq 中对回读数据做连续性校验的逻辑与 100000 回绕
minimal_modules: main() 的 GIC 配置与菜单触发循环
lectures.practice_task: 把 main.c 的 Init() 改造要点列成清单：若把流 1 改为 winOverwrite=true，应改用哪种 IRQ 回调注册函数（SetIrqCallbackStr）？相应回调里还需要做哪些调整（提示：窗口式 IRQ 与 overwrite 不兼容）？

lectures.title: IP-XACT 描述与驱动 BSP 集成
lectures.topic: 讲解 component.xml 作为 IP-XACT 产物：154 个参数、busType（aximm 主/从、axis 流、clock/reset/interrupt 信号）与文件组的组织；以及驱动如何被 Vitis/XSDK BSP 集成：data/psi_ms_daq_axi.mdd 声明 supported_peripherals、data/psi_ms_daq_axi.tcl 生成 xparameters.h、src/Makefile 把驱动编进 libxil.a。
learning_goals: 理解 component.xml 中 aximm/axis/clock/reset/interrupt 五类总线接口的来源（由 package.tcl 与 bd.tcl 共同生成）
掌握 16 路 AXI-Stream 接口与端口使能条件的对应
看清 .mdd 文件声明外设名 psi_ms_daq_axi 如何让 BSP 识别该驱动
理解 .tcl 的 generate 过程把 C_BASEADDR/C_HIGHADDR 写入 xparameters.h 的机制
了解 Makefile 如何把 *.c 编进 libxil.a 供应用链接
minimal_modules: component.xml 的 busInterfaces 与 parameters 概览
lectures.practice_task: 解释从 package.tcl 打包到 Vitis 工程能 #include "psi_ms_daq.h" 并链接成功的完整链路：打包生成 component.xml → BSP 依据 .mdd 选中驱动 → .tcl 生成 xparameters.h（含 XPAR_PSI_MS_DAQ_BASEADDR）→ Makefile 编入 libxil.a。
